message:
Clarify plan progress note to accurately reflect search implementation status

Updated the progress tracking note to more accurately describe the current
state of the search functionality and TUI interface.

Changes to the progress note:

1. Storage clarity: Changed "now persists and indexes" to "persists to
   SQLite and Tantivy" to explicitly name both persistence layers and
   clarify the dual-write pattern.

2. TUI state documentation: Added explicit note that "TUI search bar/
   results placeholder present" to document that the interactive UI
   skeleton exists with:
   - Three-pane layout (search input, results area, footer)
   - Live character-by-character query input
   - search_bar widget with vim-style "/" prefix
   - Keyboard event handling for typing and backspace

3. Search API status: Added "(search API stub pending real queries)" to
   clarify that while the SearchClient struct and method signatures exist
   (open, search), the actual implementation still returns stubs:
   - open() returns Ok(None)
   - search() returns Ok(Vec::new())

   The full query execution with:
   - QueryParser for multi-field text search
   - BooleanQuery composition for agent filtering
   - TopDocs collector for BM25-scored results
   - Document field extraction and SearchHit construction

   ...remains to be implemented in a future commit.

This update prevents confusion about the project state - the infrastructure
is in place (schema, storage, indexing, TUI layout) but the search query
execution logic that would connect the TUI input to actual Tantivy queries
is not yet implemented.

The note maintains the "watch scaffold" language which is appropriate -
watch_sources() and watch_roots() exist in indexer/mod.rs and the notify
watcher is wired up, but incremental reindexing based on file changes
needs testing and refinement to be production-ready.

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 # PLAN_FOR_CODING_AGENT_SEARCH
 
-**Progress 2025-11-21:** Schema/migration v1 + rusqlite DAL; connectors implemented (Codex, Cline, Gemini, Claude; Amp/OpenCode detect-only); index command now persists and indexes into Tantivy schema (agent/workspace/source_path/msg_idx/created_at/title/content) with optional watch scaffold; CLI/TUI shell on nightly.
+**Progress 2025-11-21:** Schema/migration v1 + rusqlite DAL; connectors implemented (Codex, Cline, Gemini, Claude; Amp/OpenCode detect-only); index command persists to SQLite and Tantivy (agent/workspace/source_path/msg_idx/created_at/title/content) with optional watch scaffold; CLI/TUI shell on nightly; TUI search bar/results placeholder present (search API stub pending real queries).
 
 Ultra-high-level:
 Build a single Rust binary (`agent-search`, name TBD) that:
